index.html.h2: Big STEM ideas, by little learners.
index.html.p: We empower young minds through fun, free STEM workshops — hands-on coding, robotics, and science for K–5 students, led by student volunteers.

about.html.p: Empowering the next generation through innovative STEM education and community-driven learning experiences.

pinboard.html.p: An open-source, browser-based platform where young makers build virtual circuits, write code, and explore STEM concepts — no download required.
